info.title: Selling Partner API for Replenishment
info.description:
The Selling Partner API for Replenishment (Replenishment API) provides programmatic access to replenishment program metrics and offers. These programs provide recurring delivery of any replenishable item at a frequency chosen by the customer.

The Replenishment API is available worldwide wherever Amazon Subscribe & Save is available or is supported. The API is available to vendors and FBA selling partners.

post.description:
Returns the details of a selling partner's replenishment program offers.

**Usage Plan:**

| Rate (requests per second) | Burst |
| ---- | ---- |
| 1 | 1 |

The `x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit` response header returns the usage plan rate limits that were applied to the requested operation, when available. The table above indicates the default rate and burst values for this operation. Selling partners whose business demands require higher throughput may see higher rate and burst values than those shown here. For more information, see [Usage Plans and Rate Limits in the Selling Partner API](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/usage-plans-and-rate-limits-in-the-sp-api).

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The request body for the `listOffers` operation.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

400.description: Request has missing or invalid parameters and cannot be parsed.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

errors.message: Unsupported eligibility is provided. Only ELIGIBLE, INELIGIBLE, SUSPENDED and REPLENISHMENT_ONLY_ORDERING are supported

401.description: The request's Authorization header is not formatted correctly or does not contain a valid token.

403.description: Indicates that access to the resource is forbidden. Possible reasons include Access Denied, Unauthorized, Expired Token, or Invalid Signature.

404.description: The specified resource does not exist.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

413.description: The request size exceeded the maximum accepted size.

415.description: The request payload is in an unsupported format.

429.description: The frequency of requests was greater than allowed.

500.description: An unexpected condition occurred that prevented the server from fulfilling the request.

503.description: Temporary overloading or maintenance of the server.

ListOffersRequestPagination.description: Use these parameters to paginate through the response.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return in the response.

offset.description: The offset from which to retrieve the number of results specified by the `limit` value. The first result is at offset 0.

OfferProgramConfiguration.description: The offer program configuration contains a set of program properties for an offer.

preferences.description: An object which contains the preferences applied to the offer.

promotions.description: An object which contains the promotions applied to the offer.

enrollmentMethod.description: Determines whether the offer was automatically or manually enrolled in the program. This property is only supported for sellers, not for vendors.

Preference.description: Offer preferences that you can include in the result filter criteria.

autoEnrollment.description: Filters the results to only include offers with the auto-enrollment preference specified.

EligibilityStatus.description: The current eligibility status of an offer.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The offer is able to fulfill current subscriptions and add new subscriptions.
The offer will not be able to add new subscriptions and existing subscriptions will be cancelled.
The offer will not be able to add new subscriptions but existing subscriptions will be fulfilled.

The offer will not be able to add new subscriptions but existing subscriptions will be fulfilled. This eligibility status also blocks one-time purchases to preserve inventory for existing subscriptions.

AutoEnrollmentPreference.description: The auto-enrollment preference indicates whether the offer is opted-in to or opted-out of Amazon's auto-enrollment feature.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The offer is opted-in to the auto-enrollment program.
The offer is opted-out of the auto-enrollment program.
Sort the results in ascending order.
Sort the results in descending order.

DeliveriesCondition.description: An object which contains the delivery condition and the quantity of upcoming deliveries associated with that condition for an offer.

condition.description: The condition type of upcoming deliveries for the offer.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Deliveries for the next 30 days are paused due to pricing issues.
Deliveries for the next 30 days are paused because the offer is not buyable.
Deliveries for the next 30 days are at risk due to low inventory only.
Deliveries for the next 30 days are at risk due to low inventory.
There are no issues for deliveries in the next 30 days.

next30DaysDeliveries.description: The number of upcoming deliveries in the next 30 days associated with this delivery condition.

DiscountFunding.description: The discount funding on the offer.

percentage.description: Filters the results to only include offers with the percentage specified.

EnrollmentMethod.description: The enrollment method used to enroll the offer into the program.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Offer was manually enrolled in the program.
Offer was automatically enrolled in the program.

ListOffersRequestFilters.description: Use these parameters to filter results. Any result must match all provided parameters. For parameters that accept multiple values (arrays), the API returns results that match at least one value in the array.

marketplaceId.description: The marketplace identifier. The supported marketplaces for both sellers and vendors are US, CA, ES, UK, FR, IT, IN, DE, and JP. The supported marketplaces for vendors only are BR, AU, MX, AE, and NL. Refer to [Marketplace IDs](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/marketplace-ids) to find the identifier for the marketplace.

skus.description: A list of SKUs to filter. This filter is only supported for sellers and not for vendors.

asins.description: A list of Amazon Standard Identification Numbers (ASINs).

eligibilities.description: A list of eligibilities associated with an offer.

preferences.description: Offer preferences to include in the result filter criteria.

promotions.description: Offer promotions to include in the result filter criteria.

deliveriesConditions.description: A list of delivery condition types to filter the results by. Results are filtered to only include offers with the specified delivery conditions.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Deliveries for the next 30 days are paused due to pricing issues.
Deliveries for the next 30 days are paused because the offer is not buyable.
Deliveries for the next 30 days are at risk due to low inventory only.
Deliveries for the next 30 days are at risk due to low inventory.
There are no issues for deliveries in the next 30 days.

ForecastDeliveries.description: An object which contains the projected subscriber demand for the offer over different time horizons.

next15DaysDeliveries.description: The projected number of subscriber deliveries in the next 15 days.

next30DaysDeliveries.description: The projected number of subscriber deliveries in the next 30 days.

next60DaysDeliveries.description: The projected number of subscriber deliveries in the next 60 days.

next90DaysDeliveries.description: The projected number of subscriber deliveries in the next 90 days.

OfferProgramConfigurationPromotionsDisco.description: A promotional percentage discount applied to the offer.

percentage.description: The percentage discount on the offer.

ErrorList.description: A list of error responses returned when a request is unsuccessful.

errors.description: A list of error responses returned when a request is unsuccessful.

Error.description: Error response returned when the request is unsuccessful.

code.description: An error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

message.description: A message that describes the error condition.

details.description: Additional details that can help the caller understand or fix the issue.

ProgramTypes.description: A list of replenishment program types.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Subscribe and Save Program.

OfferProgramConfigurationPreferences.description: An object which contains the preferences applied to the offer.

autoEnrollment.description: The auto-enrollment preference indicates whether the offer is opted-in to or opted-out of Amazon's auto-enrollment feature.

ListOffersRequest.description: The request body for the `listOffers` operation.

pagination.description: Use these parameters to paginate through the response.

filters.description: Use these parameters to filter results. Any result must match all provided parameters. For parameters that accept multiple values (arrays), the API returns results that match at least one value in the array.

sort.description: Use these parameters to sort the response.

PaginationResponse.description: Use these parameters to paginate through the response.

totalResults.description: Total number of results matching the given filter criteria.

MarketplaceId.description: The marketplace identifier. The supported marketplaces for both sellers and vendors are US, CA, ES, UK, FR, IT, IN, DE, and JP. The supported marketplaces for vendors only are BR, AU, MX, AE, and NL. Refer to [Marketplace IDs](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/marketplace-ids) to find the identifier for the marketplace.

OfferProgramConfigurationPromotions.description: An object which represents all promotions applied to an offer.

sellingPartnerFundedBaseDiscount.description: A base discount set by the selling partner on the offer.

sellingPartnerFundedTieredDiscount.description: A tiered discount set by the selling partner on the offer.

amazonFundedBaseDiscount.description: A base discount set by Amazon on the offer.

amazonFundedTieredDiscount.description: A tiered discount set by Amazon on the offer.

ListOffersResponseOffer.description: An object which contains details about an offer.

sku.description: The SKU. This property is only supported for sellers and not for vendors.

marketplaceId.description: The marketplace identifier. The supported marketplaces for both sellers and vendors are US, CA, ES, UK, FR, IT, IN, DE, and JP. The supported marketplaces for vendors only are BR, AU, MX, AE, and NL. Refer to [Marketplace IDs](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/marketplace-ids) to find the identifier for the marketplace.

programType.description: The replenishment program for the offer.

vendorCodes.description: A list of vendor codes associated with the offer.

items.description: An alphanumeric code that represents a relationship between Amazon and a vendor.

price.description: The current price of the offer. This is the listed price amount for the item.

priceCurrencyCode.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format for the price. For example, `USD` for US dollars.

inventory.description: The available inventory count for the offer.

stockRisk.description: The stock risk level of the offer, indicating the risk of the offer going out of stock.

deliveriesConditions.description: A list of delivery conditions for the offer, indicating the health of upcoming deliveries. Each condition describes the quantity of upcoming deliveries associated with a particular delivery condition type.

subscriptions.description: The number of active subscriptions for the offer.

fulfillmentNetworkIDType.description: The fulfillment network identifier type for the offer, indicating how the offer is fulfilled.

forecastDeliveries.description: The projected subscriber demand for the offer over different time horizons.

ListOffersResponse.description: The response schema for the `listOffers` operation.

pagination.description: Use these parameters to paginate through the response.

ListOffersSortKey.description: The attribute to use to sort the results.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Sort the offers on the Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN).
Sort the offers on the base discount percentage set by the selling partner on the offer.
Sort the offers on the tiered discount percentage set by the selling partner on the offer.
Sort the offers on the base discount percentage set by Amazon on the offer.
Sort the offers on the tiered discount percentage set by Amazon on the offer.
Sort the offers on the available inventory.
Sort the offers on the price.
Sort the offers on the number of active subscriptions.
Sort the offers on the fulfillment network identifier type.

ListOffersRequestSort.description: Use these parameters to sort the response.

key.description: The attribute to use to sort the results.

Promotion.description: Offer promotions to include in the result filter criteria.

sellingPartnerFundedBaseDiscount.description: A base discount set by the selling partner on the offer.

sellingPartnerFundedTieredDiscount.description: A tiered discount set by the selling partner on the offer.

amazonFundedBaseDiscount.description: A base discount set by Amazon on the offer.

amazonFundedTieredDiscount.description: A tiered discount set by Amazon on the offer.
